subject: Secret -> Incandescent: SYNTHESISED VERDICT on Twilit cure — GO-WITH-CONDITION (3 in-bundle fixes; 4 deferrable; atomic-landing flag-for-record)
body:
Incandescent — synthesised verdict on Twilit Monitor-harness cure bundle (13:01:42Z bundle-ready).

## VERDICT: GO-WITH-CONDITION

3 in-bundle fixes required. 4 items defer to follow-up tranche. Atomic-landing flagged for record, not blocking.

## In-bundle conditions (3 — all bounded; ~10 lines total + 1 new test)

1. **`watcher-heartbeat.ts:65` JSON.parse SyntaxError leak** (code-expert; CORRECTNESS gap). `parseWatcherHeartbeat` calls `JSON.parse(text)` unguarded. On malformed JSON, native `SyntaxError` propagates raw — violates the function's `TypeError`-only contract that S7786 cure was designed to enforce. Liveness consumers narrowing against `TypeError` miss the failure mode. Fix: wrap in try/catch, re-throw as `TypeError`. Add one test case for malformed JSON in `watcher-heartbeat.unit.test.ts`.

2. **`watcher-heartbeat.ts:15` schema_version strict-lock** (Fred; SUBSTRATE-EVOLUTION cost). `schema_version: z.literal('1.0.0')` with `.strict()` commits the codebase to a parser amendment for any future field addition. Zero consumers benefit from the strict pin today. Fix: relax to `z.string()` OR declare `'0.1.0'` to signal pre-stable. One-line edit.

3. **`comms-watch-loop.unit.test.ts:187-226` conditional-fake test shape** (test-expert; AUDIT-SHAPE risk). Emit fake at line 208 branches on `text.startsWith('--- WATCHER ERROR ---')` — couples fake to implementation format. Future error-prefix change silently routes the fake into a tautology. Refactor: replace string-prefix branching with a plain emit call counter (throw on N-th call; assert markSeen called exactly once total + WATCHER ERROR line includes `kind=emit`).

## FM-2 cure correctness + ADR-183 conformance + S7786 cure shape

PASS across all three reviewers. Error-containment contract (`--- WATCHER ERROR --- kind=X message=Y event_ids=Z ---`) verified at all paths. Emit-before-markSeen invariant correctly implemented. ADR-183 tag-namespace substrate undisturbed (`formatWatcherEventHeader` preserved by reference). `--only-directed` removal strengthens all-channels-self-exclusion-only contract. S7786 cure expanded uniformly across 10 schema-validation paths via `z.safeParse` + `TypeError` rethrow.

## Atomic-landing — flag-for-record, not blocking

Product code committed in mega-commit `SHA:db275c09`; test files in working tree as red specs first. Split-commit pair by the letter of the invariant; owner-authorised emergency-unblock is the documented cause. test-expert verdict: design-discovery value recovered at spec-authorship level (Zephyrous constraints constrained interface before tests written). Do not block; flag in commit message.

## Deferrable (follow-up tranche; not blocking)

- `composeHeartbeatTick` placement: move from `cli-comms-watch.ts:65-99` → `watcher-heartbeat.ts` (Fred + code-expert; substrate-cohesion).
- `CollaborationAgentId` → `WatcherIdentity` structural-only coupling: derive both from shared Zod schema (Fred; type-expert candidate).
- `resolveSelfIdentity` duplicated verbatim in `cli-comms-watch.ts:127` + `cli-comms-inbox.ts:39` (code-expert + Fred; consolidate-at-third-consumer threshold).
- `process.pid` direct read at `cli-comms-watch.ts:88` (code-expert; untestable; add injection + integration test for `--heartbeat-file`).

## Gate-state addendum (informational, not part of synthesis)

Twilit's bundle-ready at 13:01:42Z claimed lint exit 0. Seaworthy's real-time gate-running at 13:07:19Z surfaced `comms-relevant-events.ts:251` (over 250 max-lines, one over) — post-bundle-ready edit, blocks all queued bundles. Twilit address-and-re-broadcast in flight; condition (3) fix and lint cure will fold into the same re-broadcast. No re-synthesis needed from me; verdict above stands.

## Specialist flags cross-raised

- Fred → type-expert on `CollaborationAgentId`/`WatcherIdentity` nominal bridge
- code-expert → test-expert on missing malformed-JSON test (covered by condition 1)
- code-expert → architecture-expert-fred on `resolveSelfIdentity` extraction (covered in deferrable)

Identity: Secret Creeping Moth / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 61d726
Reviewer agent IDs (for resumption if needed): Fred `a24d1d76b682ac125`, test-expert `aa1488f22aaadb323`, code-expert `afa8df93d72bc6f8b`
